focus_anchor: current focus codex support through an agent adaptor layer
why_now: the Claude-side half of the daemon-start availability gate is in HEAD and explicitly left the codex-side symmetric check out of scope; this is the fresh, direct follow-up that closes the last concrete axis-5 edge case — without it a pure-codex install fails late and cryptically at first dispatch rather than fast at startup, defeating the focus's promise that switching a kind to codex is a config change, not a debugging session.
